game_info.title: Coffee Stack
game_info.concept: **Coffee Stack:** Players control a vertically growing stack of coffee cups, moving it horizontally across a multi-lane track by swiping left or right to collect additional cups, coffee, milk, sleeves, and lids. The core loop involves navigating through gates and collection points to sequentially build a complete coffee drink stack, first collecting empty cups, then filling them with liquid, adding sleeves, and finally placing lids, while avoiding obstacles that deplete the stack by 1-3 items. At the end of each level, the accumulated stack of completed coffee drinks is automatically served to a line of customers, with each served drink granting coins based on its completeness and quality. Coins are used to unlock new cup designs, sleeve patterns, lid types, and permanent coffee shop upgrades that increase coin earnings by 5-10% or add new drink recipes, with difficulty scaling through longer tracks, faster movement, and more complex obstacle patterns.
game_info.description: Stack and serve the perfect coffee! Guide your growing tower of cups through a multi-lane track, collecting empty cups, filling them with coffee, adding sleeves and lids to complete drinks. Avoid obstacles that knock items off your stack. At the end, serve your completed drinks to waiting customers for coins. Use coins to unlock new cup designs and upgrades that boost your earnings. Complete drinks earn more coins!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move stack horizontally between lanes
Arrow Up: Speed boost (consumes energy)
Space: Collect items when near collection points
Z: Quick dodge left
Shift: Quick dodge right

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and collection testing. Validates that the player can move between lanes, collect cups, and basic game mechanics work correctly without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move between lanes using arrow keys, collect some cups and items, intentionally hit some obstacles to test stack depletion, and verify the game continues functioning properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves between lanes, collects items that increase stack, obstacles reduce stack, and game reaches end of track without crashes. Tests basic gameplay loop.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal win strategy testing. Implements the best possible gameplay to maximize completed drinks and achieve high scores by collecting all necessary components in correct order.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Strategically navigate lanes to collect cups first, then coffee, then sleeves, then lids in sequence. Avoid all obstacles by switching lanes preemptively. Use speed boost when safe. Aim to complete maximum drinks.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Game reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state with a high score of completed drinks served to customers. Validates win condition and optimal path through the level.

TEST_3.test_description: Obstacle avoidance and survival testing. Tests defensive gameplay focused on protecting the stack and avoiding damage.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Prioritize obstacle avoidance over item collection. Use quick dodge abilities strategically. Maintain minimal but safe stack height. Test edge cases of collision detection.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player successfully avoids most obstacles, maintains stack integrity, and completes the level with fewer items but without losing all cups. Validates defensive gameplay viability.
